steps.title: Identify the services shown on the graph
steps.content:
The graph displays project leaders' ratings for three specific services: provision of medicinal plants (2), improvement of neighborhood attachment (3), and improvement of local microclimate (3).

Since the question asks for a choice that most effectively uses data from the graph, the correct answer must compare two of these displayed services.

steps.title: Match the accurate comparison
steps.content:
Two other options reference services not shown on the graph, so they cannot effectively use the displayed data.

The correct answer uses shown services but reverses the relationship—it claims local microclimate (3) is rated lower than medicinal plants (2), contradicting the graph.

The remaining alternative uses the graph's data: project leaders rated medicinal plants (2) lower than local microclimate (3).

That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
